comment: SHA-256 (truncated to 16 hex chars) of buildGenerationPrompt() + buildRewritePrompt() + BUILDER_SYSTEM_PROMPT rendered against SENTINEL_*_ARGS in lib/builder/prompts.ts. Run npm test (lib/builder/__tests__/prompts.test.ts) — it asserts live hashes equal these. When the prompt template intentionally changes: (1) regenerate via the failing test message, (2) bump `builder:vN → vN+1` in lib/builder/generate.ts (or `builder_rewrite:vN` if only rewrite changed) so stale cached completions don't pollute new prompts.
